name: Social Security System (SSS)
description: Social insurance providing benefits for sickness, maternity, disability, retirement, and death
benefits: Sickness: 90% of daily salary credit; Maternity: up to ₱70,000; Retirement: monthly pension
office: Nearest SSS Branch or online at my.sss.gov.ph
next_steps: Register online at my.sss.gov.ph or visit nearest SSS branch
Submit Form E-1 with supporting documents
Receive SSS number and biometrics capturing
